name: Boyne Mountain Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Boyne Mountain Resort in Boyne Falls, MI! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: Charlevoix Township - Shanahan Field Park
description: Come play pickleball at Charlevoix Township - Shanahan Field Park in Charlevoix, MI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: City Of Charlevoix - Elm St Tennis Courts
description: City Of Charlevoix - Elm St Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Charlevoix, MI. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Font Lake Park
description: Font Lake Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Beaver Island, MI. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Rotary Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Rotary Park Tennis Courts in Boyne City, MI! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
